text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh? A letter-go-round? What's that supposed to
be?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, the way it works is, I'm gonna write a letter
to your family and Grass's family.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Then... we'll write a letter to Spe's mother. Is that what a letter-go-round is?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see Special Week talking with her friends in the
cafeteria, and the sight of her reminds me of the
last time I spoke with her.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yup! I'm actually in the middle of planning out an
important operation!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I thought it would be fun to write letters together,
and I'd be able to introduce both of you to my
mom too!
choice_data_list:
(I wonder if this is the operation she was talking
about then.)

(I wonder if this is the operation she was talking
about then.)

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. This does sound very fun. I wonder what
you've written about me, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I wrote that you're always really elegant and
that your running form is beautiful, but somehow
you're still super fast!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. Hehe, your honesty is always so blindingly
pure.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Let's see. What should I write about Sei? "She's an
important friend to me. She's bright and fun and
brings a calm energy with her wherever she goes."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't rope me into this. I never said I'd
participate.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"But it's a real pain when we have to search for
her when she plays hooky from training."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You know, it's a lot more convenient to just send
a text. Why go out of your way to write a letter at
all?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"And recently, she's really been giving us the slip.
She keeps hiding in all sorts of places, as if she's a
cat or something."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Because I'm trying not to be found! You think you're the only ones having a tough time?

text_block_list.name: Sky and Grass
text_block_list.text:
"Spe's been sneaking in too many snacks
recently."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
N-nooo! Don't write that! Mom'll start sending me
fewer snacks if she finds out!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Haha! We're just teasing. "That was just a joke. In
reality, Spe cheers us up a lot with how energetic
she always is."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Letters just make me more forthcoming with my
feelings!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Thanks for writing such nice things about
me, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Don't mention it. Gosh, there's that gleaming
smile of yours.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky's Letter
text_block_list.text:
"Dear Gramps. Thanks for your call and for
watching my scrimmage. I didn't say this during
our call, but you made me real happy."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Seiun Sky receives a letter back
from her grandfather.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wow. Gramps has some seriously good
handwriting. What's this blotch of ink over here,
though?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, that letter! Did your grandpa send you a
reply?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that was close! This is confidential! If you
wanna look, you'll have to make an official
request first.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Awww... Still, I can tell it's a wonderful letter just
by looking at your face!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't get anything past a letter connoisseur like you. Fine, you're right! Gramps's letter was tear-jerking and full of warmth!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What's that, Mr. Letter? You want me to write a
response right away? Well, if you say so!

text_block_list.name: Letter from Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
"Dear Sky. I should be the one thanking you for
always bringing a smile to my face!"

text_block_list.name: Letter from Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
"Watching you run fills me up with joy and energy!
All you have to do is continue working hard and
being who you are, all right?"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad the letter made you so happy, Sei.
Seems like my letter operation was a success.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Guess it's my turn now to read the letter I
got back from my mom. ♪

text_block_list.name: Letter from Spe's Mom
text_block_list.text:
"Dear Spe. A 'letter-go-round' sounds like a really
fun idea. I'm happy to learn that you have so
many good friends."

text_block_list.name: Letter from Spe's Mom
text_block_list.text:
"Their kindness and personalities came through
loud and clear. Cherish those friendships. Spe, my
dear. I wish you a life of happiness, forever and
always."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's right, Mom! Me and my dear friends and
rivals are all doing our very best!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's right, Mom! Me and my dear friends and
rivals are all doing our very best!

text_block_list.name: Letter from Spe's Mom
text_block_list.text:
"P.S. Since you apparently have been snacking so
much, I'll be cutting back on the amount of
carrots I send you."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Nooooo!
